title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down Alex Hormozi's 4-pillar system for AI adoption in business: data as competitive moat, prioritizing voice interfaces before AI automation, decomposing workflows into smaller units, and leveraging compound effects. The video highlights a critical mistake that prompted a company-wide correction memo from Leila Hormozi at Acquisition.com.
